texto: I try to study the background of the country I am in and what were my hits there, so I can at least give them some of what they want. It's like a wedding - give them something old, something new, something borrowed and definitely something blue!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Betty Wright: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “I try to study the background of the country I am in and what were my hits there, so I can at lea…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, i-am, blue pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e estudos.

frase_original: I try to study the background of the country I am in and what were my hits there, so I can at least give them some of what they want. It's like a wedding - give them something old, something new, something borrowed and definitely something blue!
